summary: Comprehensive testing of Herion v2.0 - European premium tax management platform. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all major features including login, registration with expanded fields, forgot password flow, profile management, dashboard, practice creation wizard, practice detail with 5 AI agents, agents page with workflow pipeline, and activity log. All UI text is in Italian as required.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns healthy status
Backend: Root endpoint shows Herion branding 'Herion API - Precision. Control. Confidence.'
Backend: GET /api/countries returns 27 EU countries with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/document-categories returns 10 categories
Backend: GET /api/agents/info returns 5 agents (analysis, validation, compliance, document, communication) with workflow_steps
Backend: Admin login with admin@aic.it / Admin123! works correctly
Backend: Invalid credentials return 401
Backend: User registration with all expanded fields works
Backend: Duplicate email registration correctly rejected
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password works (MOCKED email)
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password rejects invalid token
Backend: GET /api/auth/profile returns user data
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile updates user data and persists
Backend: PUT /api/auth/change-password rejects wrong current password
Backend: Practice CRUD operations work correctly
Backend: Dashboard stats endpoint returns correct structure
Backend: Notifications endpoint works
Backend: Activity logs endpoint works
Frontend: Login page loads with Herion branding and Italian text
Frontend: Login with admin credentials redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats cards, benefits cards, recent practices, notifications, AI banner
Frontend: Floating premium navbar with rounded edges and user dropdown with Profile link

Frontend: Registration page has all expanded fields (first_name, last_name, email, phone, DOB, country selector, city, address, client type cards, fiscal code, password, confirm password, privacy/terms checkboxes)
Frontend: Client type selection shows/hides VAT and company name fields correctly
Frontend: Forgot password page accessible from login page link
Frontend: Forgot password form submits and shows success message
Frontend: Profile page shows user info and allows edits (phone, city, address, country) and password change
Frontend: Create practice flow (3-step wizard) with practice type selection, client data, and summary
Frontend: Practice detail page with agent selector (5 agents), Orchestrate button, document upload area
Frontend: Agents page showing all 5 agents with workflow pipeline visualization
Frontend: Activity log page with filters

test_credentials.test_registration: Any new email like test@herion.it / TestPass123!

seed_data_creation: Admin user auto-created on startup with credentials from .env
context_for_next_testing_agent: Herion v2.0 is fully functional. All backend APIs working. Frontend has premium Herion-branded UI with teal/emerald color scheme. All UI text is in Italian. 5 AI agents (Analysis, Validation, Compliance, Document, Communication) with orchestration. PDF download only available for completed practices. Email sending for password reset is MOCKED - logs to backend console.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Password reset email is MOCKED - reset link logged to backend console (logger.info) instead of actual email

ui.navbar: Floating premium navbar with rounded edges
